fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the skill type associated with the entry.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Skill Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the skill you want to assign.

fields.name: Assigned From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object, such as item or service item group, from which the skill code was assigned.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type of object from which this skill code originates.
This field is filled in automatically and is used for internal purposes.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code/number of the object from which the skill code originates.
This field is filled in automatically and is used for internal purposes.
